aboutParagraphs.zh: 我是一名计算机科学专业的学生，对构建网页世界充满热情。在学校之外，我把空闲时间花在设计界面、编写代码，以及把学到的东西分享到网上。
aboutParagraphs.en: I am a computer science student who is deeply interested in building thoughtful web experiences. Outside class, I spend my time designing interfaces, writing code, and sharing what I learn online.

aboutParagraphs.zh: 我的工作处于设计与工程的交汇点。我相信最好的数字体验既是美的，也是实用的。从微型工具到全栈 Web 应用，我都有实战经验。
aboutParagraphs.en: My work sits at the intersection of design and engineering. I believe the best digital experiences should feel beautiful and practical at the same time, from small tools to full-stack web products.

aboutParagraphs.zh: 不在电脑前的时候，你大概能在咖啡馆里找到我 —— 读一本关于产品设计的书、背着相机去徒步，或者在刷太多的科技类视频。这些日常都被我记录在我的频道里。
aboutParagraphs.en: When I am away from the computer, you can usually find me in a cafe, on a hike with a camera, or watching too many videos about design and technology. Those everyday fragments often end up in my channel.
